title: Fix missing 'itemReviewed' field in Review structured data (Schema.org)

requirements.text: In `frontend/index.html`, update the JSON-LD structured data block to fix the Google Rich Results error 'Champ itemReviewed manquant'. Each `Review` object inside the `review` array of the `LocalBusiness` schema must include an `itemReviewed` property referencing the business (type `LocalBusiness`, with `name: 'VERDIER COUVERTURE'`). If an `AggregateRating` is present, ensure it is correctly nested inside the `LocalBusiness` entity. Validate that the resulting JSON-LD passes Google's Rich Results Test without the 'itemReviewed missing' error.

quotes: je pense que cela et lié au avis

acceptanceCriteria: Every `Review` object in the JSON-LD structured data includes an `itemReviewed` property with `@type: 'LocalBusiness'` and `name: 'VERDIER COUVERTURE'`.
The JSON-LD block remains valid JSON and does not break any existing structured data fields (LocalBusiness, areaServed, knowsAbout, AggregateRating, etc.).
Google Rich Results Test no longer reports the 'itemReviewed missing' error for the page.
No other structured data warnings or errors are introduced by the change.

constraints: Do not remove or modify any existing structured data fields (LocalBusiness type, areaServed, knowsAbout, telephone, address, openingHours, etc.).
Do not edit any file listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Changing testimonial text, names, dates, or ratings in Testimonials.tsx.
Adding new reviews or modifying any visible review content on the page.
Any SEO changes beyond fixing the itemReviewed structured data error.
